Findings.Title: Server Admins has ShadowAdmin capability
Findings.Summary: Server Admins reaches Domain Admins through a path attackers would treat as tier-zero.
Evidence: ShadowAdmin: Nested via delegated maintenance group.

Findings.Title: svc-backup has Replication capability
Findings.Summary: svc-backup reaches dc01 through a path attackers would treat as tier-zero.
Evidence: Replication: Service account can replicate directory changes.

Findings.Title: Privileged service account: svc-backup
Findings.Summary: Service accounts with standing privilege widen the blast radius because their secrets are reused and rarely rotated aggressively.
Evidence: Review logon scope, secret storage, and interactive sign-in settings.
